headline: PROVE YOUR DATA IS TRUSTWORTHY
subheading: Turn audit trail review into a risk-based control that satisfies MHRA, Annex 11 and ALCOA+.
flux_prompt: Abstract editorial composition evoking the forensic review of a GMP electronic audit trail for data integrity. A deep navy backdrop dissolves into flowing horizontal ribbons of softly glowing time-stamped data rows, rendered as translucent teal and cyan glass strata, each line marked by faint chronological tick points and review checkmarks rendered as luminous abstract nodes. A single magnifying lens of light sweeps across one record stratum, casting a focused fresh-green accent beam that isolates and illuminates a flagged anomaly within the otherwise uniform flow, suggesting human scrutiny detecting a deviation. Layered transparent panels resemble secure system logs and chain-of-custody timelines, interlocking like a subtle double-helix lattice etched in frosted glass. Brushed-steel and clean clinical surfaces catch cool reflections; fine particle highlights and shallow depth of field create a premium clinical-luxury mood of precision, traceability and trust. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
